searchIndex.name: AI-Driven Engineering (AIDE)
searchIndex.description: A structured 7-step workflow for building new projects from scratch with AI assistants — from vision through implementation.
searchIndex.author: mnriem

searchIndex.name: Archive Extension
searchIndex.description: Archive merged features into main project memory, resolving gaps and conflicts.
searchIndex.author: Stanislav Deviatov

searchIndex.name: Azure DevOps Integration
searchIndex.description: Sync user stories and tasks to Azure DevOps work items using OAuth authentication.
searchIndex.author: pragya247

searchIndex.name: Branch Convention
searchIndex.description: Configurable branch and folder naming conventions for /specify with presets and custom patterns.
searchIndex.author: Quratulain-bilal

searchIndex.name: Bugfix Workflow
searchIndex.description: Structured bugfix workflow — capture bugs, trace to spec artifacts, and patch specs surgically.
searchIndex.author: Quratulain-bilal

searchIndex.name: Canon
searchIndex.description: Adds canon-driven (baseline-driven) workflows: spec-first, code-first, spec-drift. Requires Canon Core preset installation.
searchIndex.author: Maxim Stupakov

searchIndex.name: Checkpoint Extension
searchIndex.description: An extension to commit the changes made during the middle of the implementation, so you don't end up with just one very large commit at the end.
searchIndex.author: aaronrsun

searchIndex.name: Cleanup Extension
searchIndex.description: Post-implementation quality gate that reviews changes, fixes small issues (scout rule), creates tasks for medium issues, and generates analysis for large issues.
searchIndex.author: dsrednicki

searchIndex.name: Conduct Extension
searchIndex.description: Executes a single spec-kit phase via sub-agent delegation to reduce context pollution.
searchIndex.author: twbrandon7

searchIndex.name: Spec Critique Extension
searchIndex.description: Dual-lens critical review of spec and plan from product strategy and engineering risk perspectives.
searchIndex.author: arunt14

searchIndex.name: Confluence Extension
searchIndex.description: Create, read, and update Confluence docs for your project
searchIndex.author: aaronrsun

searchIndex.name: Spec Diagram
searchIndex.description: Auto-generate Mermaid diagrams of SDD workflow state, feature progress, and task dependencies.
searchIndex.author: Quratulain-bilal

searchIndex.name: DocGuard — CDD Enforcement
searchIndex.description: Canonical-Driven Development enforcement. Validates, scores, and traces project documentation with automated checks, AI-driven workflows, and spec-kit hooks. Zero NPM runtime dependencies.
searchIndex.author: raccioly

searchIndex.name: Project Health Check
searchIndex.description: Diagnose a Spec Kit project and report health issues across structure, agents, features, scripts, extensions, and git.
searchIndex.author: KhawarHabibKhan

searchIndex.name: Extensify
searchIndex.description: Create and validate extensions and extension catalogs.
searchIndex.author: mnriem

searchIndex.name: Fix Findings
searchIndex.description: Automated analyze-fix-reanalyze loop that resolves spec findings until clean.
searchIndex.author: Quratulain-bilal

searchIndex.name: FixIt Extension
searchIndex.description: Spec-aware bug fixing: maps bugs to spec artifacts, proposes a plan, applies minimal changes.
searchIndex.author: ismaelJimenez

searchIndex.name: Fleet Orchestrator
searchIndex.description: Orchestrate a full feature lifecycle with human-in-the-loop gates across all SpecKit phases.
searchIndex.author: sharathsatish

searchIndex.name: Iterate
searchIndex.description: Iterate on spec documents with a two-phase define-and-apply workflow — refine specs mid-implementation and go straight back to building
searchIndex.author: Vianca Martinez

searchIndex.name: Jira Integration
searchIndex.description: Create Jira Epics, Stories, and Issues from spec-kit specifications and task breakdowns with configurable hierarchy and custom field support.
searchIndex.author: mbachorik

searchIndex.name: Learning Extension
searchIndex.description: Generate educational guides from implementations and enhance clarifications with mentoring context.
searchIndex.author: Vianca Martinez

searchIndex.name: MAQA — Multi-Agent & Quality Assurance
searchIndex.description: Coordinator → feature → QA agent workflow with parallel worktree-based implementation. Language-agnostic. Auto-detects installed board plugins (Trello, Linear, GitHub Projects, Jira, Azure DevOps). Optional CI gate.
searchIndex.author: GenieRobot

searchIndex.name: MAQA Azure DevOps Integration
searchIndex.description: Azure DevOps Boards integration for the MAQA extension. Populates work items from specs, moves User Stories across columns as features progress, real-time Task child ticking.
searchIndex.author: GenieRobot

searchIndex.name: MAQA CI/CD Gate
searchIndex.description: CI/CD pipeline gate for the MAQA extension. Auto-detects GitHub Actions, CircleCI, GitLab CI, and Bitbucket Pipelines. Blocks QA handoff until pipeline is green.
searchIndex.author: GenieRobot

searchIndex.name: MAQA GitHub Projects Integration
searchIndex.description: GitHub Projects v2 integration for the MAQA extension. Populates draft issues from specs, moves items across Status columns as features progress, real-time task list ticking.
searchIndex.author: GenieRobot

searchIndex.name: MAQA Jira Integration
searchIndex.description: Jira integration for the MAQA extension. Populates Stories from specs, moves issues across board columns as features progress, real-time Subtask ticking.
searchIndex.author: GenieRobot

searchIndex.name: MAQA Linear Integration
searchIndex.description: Linear integration for the MAQA extension. Populates issues from specs, moves items across workflow states as features progress, real-time sub-issue ticking.
searchIndex.author: GenieRobot

searchIndex.name: MAQA Trello Integration
searchIndex.description: Trello board integration for the MAQA extension. Populates board from specs, moves cards between lists as features progress, real-time checklist ticking.
searchIndex.author: GenieRobot

searchIndex.name: MemoryLint
searchIndex.description: Agent memory governance tool: Automatically audits and fixes boundary conflicts between AGENTS.md and the constitution.
searchIndex.author: RbBtSn0w

searchIndex.name: Onboard
searchIndex.description: Contextual onboarding and progressive growth for developers new to spec-kit projects. Explains specs, maps dependencies, validates understanding, and guides the next step.
searchIndex.author: Rafael Sales

searchIndex.name: Optimize Extension
searchIndex.description: Audits and optimizes AI governance for context efficiency
searchIndex.author: sakitA

searchIndex.name: Plan Review Gate
searchIndex.description: Require spec.md and plan.md to be merged via MR/PR before allowing task generation
searchIndex.author: luno

searchIndex.name: Presetify
searchIndex.description: Create and validate presets and preset catalogs.
searchIndex.author: mnriem

searchIndex.name: Product Forge
searchIndex.description: Full product lifecycle: research → product spec → SpecKit → implement → verify → test
searchIndex.author: VaiYav

searchIndex.name: QA Testing Extension
searchIndex.description: Systematic QA testing with browser-driven or CLI-based validation of acceptance criteria from spec.
searchIndex.author: arunt14

searchIndex.name: Ralph Loop
searchIndex.description: Autonomous implementation loop using AI agent CLI.
searchIndex.author: Rubiss

searchIndex.name: Reconcile Extension
searchIndex.description: Reconcile implementation drift by surgically updating the feature's own spec, plan, and tasks.
searchIndex.author: Stanislav Deviatov

searchIndex.name: Spec Refine
searchIndex.description: Update specs in-place, propagate changes to plan and tasks, and diff impact across artifacts.
searchIndex.author: Quratulain-bilal

searchIndex.name: Repository Index
searchIndex.description: Generate index of your repo for overview, architecture and module
searchIndex.author: Yiyu Liu

searchIndex.name: Retro Extension
searchIndex.description: Sprint retrospective analysis with metrics, spec accuracy assessment, and improvement suggestions.
searchIndex.author: arunt14

searchIndex.name: Retrospective Extension
searchIndex.description: Post-implementation retrospective with spec adherence scoring, drift analysis, and human-gated spec updates.
searchIndex.author: emi-dm

searchIndex.name: Review Extension
searchIndex.description: Post-implementation comprehensive code review with specialized agents for code quality, comments, tests, error handling, type design, and simplification.
searchIndex.author: ismaelJimenez

searchIndex.name: Security Review
searchIndex.description: Comprehensive security audit of codebases using AI-powered DevSecOps analysis
searchIndex.author: DyanGalih

searchIndex.name: Ship Release Extension
searchIndex.description: Automates release pipeline: pre-flight checks, branch sync, changelog generation, CI verification, and PR creation.
searchIndex.author: arunt14

searchIndex.name: SDD Utilities
searchIndex.description: Resume interrupted workflows, validate project health, and verify spec-to-task traceability.
searchIndex.author: mvanhorn

searchIndex.name: Staff Review Extension
searchIndex.description: Staff-engineer-level code review that validates implementation against spec, checks security, performance, and test coverage.
searchIndex.author: arunt14

searchIndex.name: Project Status
searchIndex.description: Show current SDD workflow progress — active feature, artifact status, task completion, workflow phase, and extensions summary.
searchIndex.author: KhawarHabibKhan

searchIndex.name: Superpowers Bridge
searchIndex.description: Orchestrates obra/superpowers skills within the spec-kit SDD workflow. Thin bridge commands delegate to superpowers' authoritative SKILL.md files at runtime (with graceful fallback), while bridge-original commands provide spec-kit-native value. Eight commands cover the full lifecycle: intent clarification, TDD enforcement, task review, verification, critique, systematic debugging, branch completion, and review response. Hook-bound commands fire automatically; standalone commands are invoked when needed.
searchIndex.author: rbbtsn0w

searchIndex.name: Spec Sync
searchIndex.description: Detect and resolve drift between specs and implementation. AI-assisted resolution with human approval.
searchIndex.author: bgervin

searchIndex.name: V-Model Extension Pack
searchIndex.description: Enforces V-Model paired generation of development specs and test specs with full traceability.
searchIndex.author: leocamello

searchIndex.name: Verify Extension
searchIndex.description: Post-implementation quality gate that validates implemented code against specification artifacts.
searchIndex.author: ismaelJimenez

searchIndex.name: Verify Tasks Extension
searchIndex.description: Detect phantom completions: tasks marked [X] in tasks.md with no real implementation.
searchIndex.author: Dave Sharpe

searchIndex.name: Worktree Isolation
searchIndex.description: Spawn isolated git worktrees for parallel feature development without checkout switching.
searchIndex.author: Quratulain-bilal
